regional_cost_note: Bathroom renovations in Christchurch typically cost $9,000–$17,000 for a basic refresh, $20,000–$38,000 for a mid-range full reno, and $38,000–$85,000+ for premium work. Canterbury rates are near the national average; post-earthquake rebuild experience is common across local trades. Waterproofing, tiling, and plumbing are the largest cost components — confirm all are included in any fixed-price quote.
